serviceDescription:
Automates recurring on-chain crypto payroll. Schedules hourly/daily/weekly/monthly payments in USDC, USDT, or ETH to any EVM or Solana wallet and returns a signed tx receipt per payment.
Commands: (1) pay 50 USDC weekly to 0x... on base - creates schedule; (2) list schedules; (3) cancel schedule ID; (4) show history - receipts. Chains: xlayer, base, ethereum, bsc, polygon.
